narrative_beat: Dedos metalicos dourados apontando para a camera

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid articulated robot hand in aged gold and chrome with visible joints and gears reaching toward camera palm open in extreme foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden articulated fingers and visible gear joints
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated city street with unrecognizable pedestrians in background
props: robot hand in aged gold and chrome

composition.foreground: robot hand in vivid gold chrome

style.post_processing: halation on hand, deep black crush, 35mm grain

symbolism.primary: the hand of the machine extended to humanity
symbolism.secondary: palm open as demand for submission

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
